mapper.select: select fn_om_cooutky300() as COOUTKY from DUAL
select fn_wm_shpdcky() as SHPDCKY from DUAL
select fn_wm_eoasnky() as EOASNKY from DUAL
select fn_wm_taskoky() as TASKOKY from DUAL
select fn_wm_rcvdcky() as RCVDCKY from DUAL
select fn_wm_pmtinno() as PMTINNO from DUAL
select fn_om_salgrky() as SALGRKY from DUAL

select COMPKEY , COOUTIT as SHPDCIT , MNGWHKY as WAREKEY , '700' as DOCCATE , case when DOCTYPE = '310' then '750' when DOCTYPE = '330' then '760' when DOCTYPE = '370' then '770' end as DOCTYPE , 'NEW' as SHPDCST , 'NEW' as SHPITST , ' ' as PICKTYP , ' ' as OGSTRKY , ' ' as ALSTRKY , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , (SELECT SKUDESC FROM mskuwc WHERE COMPKEY = OC.COMPKEY AND OWNERKY = OC.OWNERKY AND WAREKEY = OC.MNGWHKY AND SKUMKEY = OC.SKUMKEY) as SKUDESC , to_char(now(),'YYYYMMDD') as SHPPDAY , to_char(now(),'hh24miss') as SHPPTIM , ' ' as SHPSDAY , ' ' as SHPSTIM , ' ' as SPEHTIM , ' ' as SPEITIM , ' ' as SALDATE , CUSTKEY , RETAKEY , VENDKEY , SALMEMO , SALRQDT , SALRQTM , SOITQTY as SHCUQTY , RGITQTY as RGITQTY , 0 as SHALQTY , 0 as SHPKQTY , 0 as SHDVSQT , 0 as SHDVEQT , 0 as SHCFQTY , 'EA' as SUOMKEY , 'FREE' as PAYTYPE , 'DC' as DCTCTYP , ' ' as ALLGRKY , ' ' as PAKLBKY , ' ' as REFPODC , ' ' as REFPOIT , COOUTKY as REFSODC , COOUTIT as REFSOIT , ' ' as REFDNDC , ' ' as REFDNIT , ' ' as REFSDDC , ' ' as REFSDIT , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER from OCOSAL OC where COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND COOUTKY = #{cooutky}

SELECT WA.COMPKEY , WA.WAREKEY , WA.DOCCATE , WA.DOCTYPE , MD.DOCTYNM , WA.EOASNKY , WA.ASNSTAT , date_format(WA.ASNDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS ASNDATE , WA.OWNERKY , WA.VENDKEY , MP.PTNAMLC AS VENDNAM , WA.CUSTKEY , MC1.CUNAMLC AS CUSTNAM , WA.RETAKEY , MC2.CUNAMLC AS RETANAM , FORMAT(SUM((WA.ASNDQTY - WA.RCHSQTY) / MS.ROINQTY), 1) AS GPAKCNT , SUM(WA.ASNDQTY) AS ASNDQTY , COUNT(1) AS ITEMCNT FROM WASNIF WA INNER JOIN MSKUWC MS ON MS.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND MS.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY AND MS.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY AND MS.SKUMKEY = WA.SKUMKEY INNER JOIN MDOCMA MD ON MD.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND MD.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY AND MD.DOCCATE = WA.DOCCATE AND MD.DOCTYPE = WA.DOCTYPE INNER JOIN MPTNMA MP ON MP.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND MP.PTNRKEY = WA.VENDKEY AND MP.PTDELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN MCUSMA MC1 ON MC1.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND MC1.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY AND MC1.CUSTKEY = WA.CUSTKEY LEFT JOIN MCUSMA MC2 ON MC2.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND MC2.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY AND MC2.CUSTKEY = WA.RETAKEY WHERE WA.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND WA.ASNSTAT != 'CMP' AND WA.DOCCATE = '400' AND WA.DOCTYPE in ('440') AND WA.WAREKEY = 'WHOLESALE' AND WA.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} AND WA.CUSTKEY IN ( #{custkey} )
and WA.ASNDATE >= REPLACE(#{asndatf}, '-', '')
and WA.ASNDATE <= REPLACE(#{asndatt}, '-', '')
group by WA.COMPKEY , WA.WAREKEY , WA.DOCCATE , WA.DOCTYPE , MD.DOCTYNM , WA.EOASNKY , WA.ASNSTAT , WA.ASNDATE , WA.OWNERKY , WA.VENDKEY , MP.PTNAMLC , WA.CUSTKEY , MC1.CUNAMLC , WA.RETAKEY , MC2.CUNAMLC

SELECT CONCAT(WA.COMPKEY, WA.EOASNKY, WA.EOASNIT) AS ROWKEY , WA.COMPKEY , WA.EOASNKY , WA.EOASNIT , WA.WAREKEY , WA.DOCCATE , WA.DOCTYPE , MD.DOCTYNM , FN_WM_GETPASTRKY( WA.COMPKEY, WA.WAREKEY, WA.DOCCATE, WA.DOCTYPE, WA.OWNERKY, WA.SKUMKEY, WA.VENDKEY, ' ' , MS.SKUWABC, WA.CUSTKEY, MS.SKUGR01, MS.SKUGR02, MS.SKUGR03, MS.SKUGR04, MS.SKUGR05) AS PASTRKY , WA.ASNSTAT , ( SELECT COMCDTX FROM MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND COMCDKY = 'ASNSTAT' AND COMCDVL = WA.ASNSTAT ) AS ASNSNAM , MD.FRLOCKY AS RVLOCKY , date_format(WA.ASNDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS ASNDATE , WA.OWNERKY , WA.SKUMKEY , WA.SKUDESC , WA.POITQTY , WA.ASNDQTY , WA.RCHSQTY , WA.RCHPQTY , (WA.RCHPQTY - WA.RCHSQTY) AS RCVEQTY , FORMAT((WA.ASNDQTY - WA.RCHSQTY) / MS.ROINQTY, 1) AS GPAKCNT , WA.VENDKEY , MP.PTNAMLC AS VENDNAM , WA.CUSTKEY , MC1.CUNAMLC AS CUSTNAM , WA.DCTCTYP , MS.SKUWABC , WA.RETAKEY , MC2.CUNAMLC AS RETANAM , WA.COPODKY , WA.COPODIT , WA.REFSODC , WA.REFSOIT FROM WASNIF WA INNER JOIN MSKUWC MS ON MS.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND MS.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY AND MS.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY AND MS.SKUMKEY = WA.SKUMKEY INNER JOIN MDOCMA MD ON MD.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND MD.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY AND MD.DOCCATE = WA.DOCCATE AND MD.DOCTYPE = WA.DOCTYPE INNER JOIN MPTNMA MP ON MP.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND MP.PTNRKEY = WA.VENDKEY AND MP.PTDELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN MCUSMA MC1 ON MC1.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND MC1.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY AND MC1.CUSTKEY = WA.CUSTKEY LEFT JOIN MCUSMA MC2 ON MC2.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND MC2.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY AND MC2.CUSTKEY = WA.RETAKEY WHERE WA.COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND WA.WAREKEY = 'WHOLESALE' AND WA.EOASNKY = #{eoasnky} AND WA.ASNSTAT = #{asnstat} AND WA.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} AND WA.CUSTKEY = #{custkey} AND WA.RETAKEY = #{retakey}
mapper.update: update OCOSAL OS inner join OCLMAP OM on OM.COMPKEY = OS.COMPKEY and OM.WAREKEY = OS.MNGWHKY and OM.COTYPE1 = OS.DOCCATE and OM.COTYPE2 = OS.DOCTYPE set OS.SALSTAT = 'ORDFM' , OS.INBSTAT = 'WHIN' , OS.LMODATE = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y%m%d') , OS.LMOTIME = date_format(sysdate(), '%H%i%S') , OS.LMOUSER = #{userData.useract} where OS.COMPKEY = #{item.compkey} and OS.COOUTKY = #{item.refsodc} and OS.COOUTIT = #{item.refsoit}
mapper.select:
SELECT CONCAT(W.COMPKEY , W.STOCKKY) AS ROWKEY , W.COMPKEY AS COMPKEY , W.STOCKKY AS STOCKKY , W.WAREKEY AS WAREKEY , '500' AS DOCCATE , '540' AS DOCTYPE , W.TRUNTYP AS TRUNTYP , W.TRUNPID AS TRUNPID , W.LOTNMKY AS LOTNMKY , W.OWNERKY AS OWNERKY , W.SKUMKEY AS SKUMKEY , W.SKUDESC AS SKUDESC , W.VENDKEY AS VENDKEY , (select PTNAMLC from mptnma where COMPKEY = M.COMPKEY and OWNERKY = M.OWNERKY and PTNRKEY = W.VENDKEY) as PTNAMLC , W.AREAKEY AS AREAKEY , W.ZONEKEY AS ZONEKEY , W.LOCAKEY AS LOCAKEY , W.SIRBCOD AS SIRBCOD , W.STOTQTY AS STOTQTY , 'SHP' AS TOAREKY , 'SHPZ' AS TOZONKY , 'SHPLOC' AS TOLOCKY , 0 AS FORDQTY , '' AS PARSNCD , '' AS PARSNNM , W.SALLQTY AS SALLQTY , W.SINBQTY AS SINBQTY , W.SOUBQTY AS SOUBQTY , W.SBLOQTY AS SBLOQTY , W.SUOMKEY AS SUOMKEY , date_format(W.PRODDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS PRODDAT , W.SHELIFE AS SHELIFE , date_format(W.EXPIDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS EXPIDAT , W.RCVDCDT AS RCVDCDT , W.RCVFRDT AS RCVFRDT , W.LOTFRKY AS LOTFRKY , W.LOTAT01 AS LOTAT01 , W.LOTAT02 AS LOTAT02 , W.LOTAT03 AS LOTAT03 , W.LOTAT04 AS LOTAT04 , W.LOTAT05 AS LOTAT05 , W.LOTAT06 AS LOTAT06 , W.LOTAT07 AS LOTAT07 , W.LOTAT08 AS LOTAT08 , W.LOTAT09 AS LOTAT09 , W.LOTAT10 AS LOTAT10 , W.LOTAT11 AS LOTAT11 , W.LOTAT12 AS LOTAT12 , W.LOTAT13 AS LOTAT13 , W.LOTAT14 AS LOTAT14 , W.LOTAT15 AS LOTAT15 , W.LOTAT16 AS LOTAT16 , W.LOTAT17 AS LOTAT17 , W.LOTAT18 AS LOTAT18 , W.LOTAT19 AS LOTAT19 , W.LOTAT20 AS LOTAT20 , W.STKSTAT AS STKSTAT , W.BLOCKID AS BLOCKID , W.PHYSROW AS PHYSROW , W.PHYSSEC AS PHYSSEC , W.PHYSFLO AS PHYSFLO , W.RCVDCKY AS RCVDCKY , W.RCVDCIT AS RCVDCIT , W.TASKOKY AS TASKOKY , W.TASKOIT AS TASKOIT , W.SHPDCKY AS SHPDCKY , W.SHPDCIT AS SHPDCIT , W.ADJSOKY AS ADJSOKY , W.ADJSOIT AS ADJSOIT , W.PHYSOKY AS PHYSOKY , W.PHYSOIT AS PHYSOIT , W.STORFKY AS STORFKY , date_format(W.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CREDATE , date_format(W.CRETIME, '%H-%i-%s') as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(W.COMPKEY , W.CREUSER) AS CREUSER , date_format(W.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS LMODATE , date_format(W.LMOTIME, '%H-%i-%s') as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(W.COMPKEY ,W.LMOUSER) AS LMOUSER , W.INDIBZL AS INDIBZL , W.INDIARC AS INDIARC , W.UPDTCHK AS UPDTCHK FROM WSTKKY W INNER JOIN MSKUWC M ON M.COMPKEY = W.COMPKEY AND M.WAREKEY = W.WAREKEY AND M.OWNERKY = W.OWNERKY AND M.SKUMKEY = W.SKUMKEY WHERE 1=1 AND W.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND W.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} AND W.WAREKEY = 'WHOLESALE' AND W.AREAKEY = 'STG'
AND W.LOCAKEY = #{custkey}
AND upper(W.SKUMKEY) like concat('%', upper(#{skumkey}),'%')
AND upper(W.SKUDESC) like concat('%', upper(#{skudesc}),'%')
AND W.STKSTAT = '80' AND W.STOTQTY > 0 AND W.SALLQTY = 0 AND W.SOUBQTY = 0 AND W.SBLOQTY = 0
mapper.insert:
insert into WTAKIT ( COMPKEY , STORFKY , TASKOKY , TASKOIT , TASKSTS , WAREKEY , DOCCATE , DOCTYPE , TRUNTYP , TRUNPID , LOTNMKY , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , SKUDESC , VENDKEY , FRAREKY , FRZONKY , FRLOCKY , TOAREKY , TOZONKY , TOLOCKY , FORDQTY , FUOMEKY , TCMPQTY , TUOMEKY , SIRBCOD , PRODDAT , SHELIFE , EXPIDAT , RCVDCDT , RCVFRDT , LOTFRKY , LOTAT01 , LOTAT02 , LOTAT03 , LOTAT04 , LOTAT05 , LOTAT06 , LOTAT07 , LOTAT08 , LOTAT09 , LOTAT10 , LOTAT11 , LOTAT12 , LOTAT13 , LOTAT14 , LOTAT15 , LOTAT16 , LOTAT17 , LOTAT18 , LOTAT19 , LOTAT20 , PARSNCD , PARSNNM , PKRSNCD , PKRSNNM , RCVDCKY , RCVDCIT , SHPDCKY , SHPDCIT , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER ) values
( #{item.compkey} , #{item.stockky} , #{item.taskoky} , #{item.taskoit} , "NEW" , #{item.warekey} , #{item.doccate} , #{item.doctype} , #{item.truntyp} , #{item.trunpid} , #{item.lotnmky} , #{item.ownerky} , #{item.skumkey} , (SELECT SKUDESC FROM mskuwc WHERE COMPKEY = #{item.compkey} AND OWNERKY = #{item.ownerky} AND WAREKEY = #{item.warekey} AND SKUMKEY = #{item.skumkey}), #{item.vendkey} , #{item.areakey} , #{item.zonekey} , #{item.locakey} , #{item.toareky} , #{item.tozonky} , #{item.tolocky} , #{item.fordqty} , #{item.suomkey} , 0 , #{item.suomkey} , #{item.sirbcod} , replace(#{item.proddat}, '-', '') , #{item.shelife} , replace(#{item.expidat}, '-', '') , replace(#{item.rcvdcdt}, '-', '') , replace(#{item.rcvfrdt}, '-', '') , #{item.lotfrky} , #{item.lotat01} , #{item.lotat02} , #{item.lotat03} , #{item.lotat04} , #{item.lotat05} , #{item.lotat06} , #{litem.otat07} , #{item.lotat08} , #{item.lotat09} , #{item.lotat10} , #{item.lotat11} , #{item.lotat12} , #{item.lotat13} , #{item.lotat14} , #{item.lotat15} , #{item.lotat16} , #{item.lotat17} , #{item.lotat18} , #{item.lotat19} , #{item.lotat20} , #{item.parsncd} , #{item.parsnnm} , #{item.rsncode} , #{item.adjsrmk} , #{item.rcvdcky} , #{item.rcvdcit} , #{item.shpdcky} , #{item.shpdcit} , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') , #{userData.useract} , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') , #{userData.useract} )
mapper.select:
SELECT COMPKEY as COMPKEY , #{cooutky} as COOUTKY , TASKOIT AS COOUTIT , '300' as DOCCATE , #{doctype} as DOCTYPE , ' ' as SALMODE , ' ' as SALGRKY , case when #{doctype} = '340' then 'ORDFM' when (#{doctype} = '350' or #{doctype} = '360') then 'ORDFM' end as SALSTAT , to_char(now(),'YYYYMMDD') as POSTDAT , to_char(now(),'YYYYMMDD') as SALDATE , to_char(now(),'hh24miss') as SALTIME , FRLOCKY as CUSTKEY , #{towhous} as RETAKEY , case when #{doctype} = '340' then #{towhous} else ' ' end as VENDKEY , #{salmemo} as SALMEMO , replace(#{salrqdt} , '-', '') as SALRQDT , replace(#{salrqtm} , ':', '') as SALRQTM , 'N' as SALLBYN , OWNERKY as OWNERKY , SKUMKEY as SKUMKEY , (SELECT SKUDESC FROM MSKUWC WHERE COMPKEY = WT.COMPKEY AND OWNERKY = WT.OWNERKY AND WAREKEY = WT.WAREKEY AND SKUMKEY = WT.SKUMKEY) as SKUDESC , (SELECT SKUSKEY FROM MSKUWC WHERE COMPKEY = WT.COMPKEY AND OWNERKY = WT.OWNERKY AND WAREKEY = WT.WAREKEY AND SKUMKEY = WT.SKUMKEY) as SKUSKEY , fordqty as SOITQTY , fordqty as RGITQTY , fordqty as SHCFQTY , 'EA' as SUOMKEY , 'FREE' as PAYTYPE , 'DC' as DCTCTYP , case when #{doctype} = '340' then WAREKEY when (#{doctype} = '350' or #{doctype} = '360') then #{towhous} end as MNGWHKY , #{rsncode} as RSNCODE , #{rsndesc} as RSNDESC , 'NEW' as INBSTAT , 'NEW' as OUBSTAT , (SELECT ITMCOST FROM MSKUWC WHERE COMPKEY = WT.COMPKEY AND OWNERKY = WT.OWNERKY AND WAREKEY = WT.WAREKEY AND SKUMKEY = WT.SKUMKEY) as ITMCOST , (SELECT SELPRIC FROM MSKUWC WHERE COMPKEY = WT.COMPKEY AND OWNERKY = WT.OWNERKY AND WAREKEY = WT.WAREKEY AND SKUMKEY = WT.SKUMKEY) as SELPRIC , 0 as SEDPRIC , 0 as SEPRICE , ' ' as ORDGR01 , ' ' as ORDGR02 , ' ' as ORDGR03 , 'N' as CLOSLYN , ' ' as CLODATE , ' ' as CLOTIME , ' ' as CLOUSER , ' ' as SPRETYP , 'N' as PMTSAYN , ' ' as PMTSADT , ' ' as PMTSATM , ' ' as PMTSAUR , to_char(now(),'YYYYMMDD') as CREDATE , to_char(now(),'hh24miss') asCRETIME , #{userData.useract} as CREUSER , to_char(now(),'YYYYMMDD') as LMODATE , to_char(now(),'hh24miss') as LMOTIME , #{userData.useract} as LMOUSER
FROM WTAKIT WT WHERE 1=1 AND COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND TASKOKY = #{taskoky}

SELECT CONCAT(SAL.DOCCATE, SAL.DOCTYPE) AS ROWKEY, SAL.DOCCATE, SAL.DOCTYPE, (SELECT M.DOCTYNM FROM MDOCMA M WHERE M.DOCCATE = SAL.DOCCATE AND M.DOCTYPE = SAL.DOCTYPE AND M.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey}) as DOCNAME, SAL.SALGRKY, SAL.SALSTAT, SAL.CUSTKEY, SAL.TOWARKY, SAL.VENDKEY, ( SELECT CUS.CUNAMLC FROM MCUSMA CUS WHERE CUS.CUSTKEY = SAL.VENDKEY AND CUS.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} ) AS VENDNAM, SAL.RETAKEY, ( SELECT CUS.CUNAMLC FROM MCUSMA CUS WHERE CUS.CUSTKEY = SAL.RETAKEY AND CUS.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} ) AS RETANAM, SUM(SAL.SOITQTY) as SOITQTY, SUM(SAL.RGITQTY) as RGITQTY, SUM(SAL.SHCFQTY) as SHCFQTY FROM OCOSAL SAL WHERE SAL.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND SAL.DOCCATE = #{doccate} AND SAL.CUSTKEY = #{custkey}
AND SAL.DOCTYPE = #{doctype}
AND SAL.CREDATE >= replace(#{credafr}, '-', '')
AND SAL.CREDATE <= replace(#{credato}, '-', '')
AND SAL.SALRQDT >= replace(#{salrqfr}, '-', '')
AND SAL.SALRQDT <= replace(#{salrqto}, '-', '')
AND SALSTAT = 'ORDER'
AND SALSTAT not in ('ORDER', 'DELETE')
GROUP BY SAL.DOCCATE, SAL.DOCTYPE, SAL.SALGRKY, SAL.SALSTAT, SAL.CUSTKEY, SAL.TOWARKY, SAL.VENDKEY, SAL.RETAKEY

SELECT W.COMPKEY AS COMPKEY , W.STOCKKY AS STOCKKY , W.WAREKEY AS WAREKEY , '500' AS DOCCATE , '540' AS DOCTYPE , W.TRUNTYP AS TRUNTYP , W.TRUNPID AS TRUNPID , W.LOTNMKY AS LOTNMKY , W.OWNERKY AS OWNERKY , W.SKUMKEY AS SKUMKEY , W.SKUDESC AS SKUDESC , W.VENDKEY AS VENDKEY , (select PTNAMLC from mptnma where COMPKEY = M.COMPKEY and OWNERKY = M.OWNERKY and PTNRKEY = W.VENDKEY) as PTNAMLC , W.AREAKEY AS AREAKEY , W.ZONEKEY AS ZONEKEY , W.LOCAKEY AS LOCAKEY , W.SIRBCOD AS SIRBCOD , W.STOTQTY AS STOTQTY , 'SHP' AS TOAREKY , 'SHPZ' AS TOZONKY , 'SHPLOC' AS TOLOCKY , #{item.scitqty} AS FORDQTY , '' AS PARSNCD , '' AS PARSNNM , W.SALLQTY AS SALLQTY , W.SINBQTY AS SINBQTY , W.SOUBQTY AS SOUBQTY , W.SBLOQTY AS SBLOQTY , W.SUOMKEY AS SUOMKEY , date_format(W.PRODDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS PRODDAT , W.SHELIFE AS SHELIFE , date_format(W.EXPIDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS EXPIDAT , W.RCVDCDT AS RCVDCDT , W.RCVFRDT AS RCVFRDT , W.LOTFRKY AS LOTFRKY , W.LOTAT01 AS LOTAT01 , W.LOTAT02 AS LOTAT02 , W.LOTAT03 AS LOTAT03 , W.LOTAT04 AS LOTAT04 , W.LOTAT05 AS LOTAT05 , W.LOTAT06 AS LOTAT06 , W.LOTAT07 AS LOTAT07 , W.LOTAT08 AS LOTAT08 , W.LOTAT09 AS LOTAT09 , W.LOTAT10 AS LOTAT10 , W.LOTAT11 AS LOTAT11 , W.LOTAT12 AS LOTAT12 , W.LOTAT13 AS LOTAT13 , W.LOTAT14 AS LOTAT14 , W.LOTAT15 AS LOTAT15 , W.LOTAT16 AS LOTAT16 , W.LOTAT17 AS LOTAT17 , W.LOTAT18 AS LOTAT18 , W.LOTAT19 AS LOTAT19 , W.LOTAT20 AS LOTAT20 , W.STKSTAT AS STKSTAT , W.BLOCKID AS BLOCKID , W.PHYSROW AS PHYSROW , W.PHYSSEC AS PHYSSEC , W.PHYSFLO AS PHYSFLO , W.RCVDCKY AS RCVDCKY , W.RCVDCIT AS RCVDCIT , W.TASKOKY AS TASKOKY , W.TASKOIT AS TASKOIT , W.SHPDCKY AS SHPDCKY , W.SHPDCIT AS SHPDCIT , W.ADJSOKY AS ADJSOKY , W.ADJSOIT AS ADJSOIT , W.PHYSOKY AS PHYSOKY , W.PHYSOIT AS PHYSOIT , W.STORFKY AS STORFKY , date_format(W.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CREDATE , date_format(W.CRETIME, '%H-%i-%s') as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(W.COMPKEY , W.CREUSER) AS CREUSER , date_format(W.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS LMODATE , date_format(W.LMOTIME, '%H-%i-%s') as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(W.COMPKEY ,W.LMOUSER) AS LMOUSER , W.INDIBZL AS INDIBZL , W.INDIARC AS INDIARC , W.UPDTCHK AS UPDTCHK FROM WSTKKY W INNER JOIN MSKUWC M ON M.COMPKEY = W.COMPKEY AND M.WAREKEY = W.WAREKEY AND M.OWNERKY = W.OWNERKY AND M.SKUMKEY = W.SKUMKEY WHERE 1=1 AND W.COMPKEY = #{item.compkey} AND W.OWNERKY = #{item.ownerky} AND W.SKUMKEY = #{item.skumkey} AND W.WAREKEY = 'WHOLESALE' AND W.AREAKEY = 'STG' AND W.STKSTAT = (case when #{item.doctype} = '320' then '60' when #{item.doctype} != '320' then '80' end) AND W.STOTQTY > 0 AND W.SALLQTY = 0 AND W.SOUBQTY = 0 AND W.SBLOQTY = 0

SELECT W.COMPKEY AS COMPKEY , W.STOCKKY AS STOCKKY , W.WAREKEY AS WAREKEY , '500' AS DOCCATE , '540' AS DOCTYPE , W.TRUNTYP AS TRUNTYP , W.TRUNPID AS TRUNPID , W.LOTNMKY AS LOTNMKY , W.OWNERKY AS OWNERKY , W.SKUMKEY AS SKUMKEY , W.SKUDESC AS SKUDESC , W.VENDKEY AS VENDKEY , (select PTNAMLC from mptnma where COMPKEY = M.COMPKEY and OWNERKY = M.OWNERKY and PTNRKEY = W.VENDKEY) as PTNAMLC , W.AREAKEY AS AREAKEY , W.ZONEKEY AS ZONEKEY , W.LOCAKEY AS LOCAKEY , W.SIRBCOD AS SIRBCOD , W.STOTQTY AS STOTQTY , W.AREAKEY AS TOAREKY , W.ZONEKEY AS TOZONKY , W.LOCAKEY AS TOLOCKY , #{item.scitqty} AS FORDQTY , '' AS PARSNCD , '' AS PARSNNM , W.SALLQTY AS SALLQTY , W.SINBQTY AS SINBQTY , W.SOUBQTY AS SOUBQTY , W.SBLOQTY AS SBLOQTY , W.SUOMKEY AS SUOMKEY , date_format(W.PRODDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS PRODDAT , W.SHELIFE AS SHELIFE , date_format(W.EXPIDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS EXPIDAT , W.RCVDCDT AS RCVDCDT , W.RCVFRDT AS RCVFRDT , W.LOTFRKY AS LOTFRKY , W.LOTAT01 AS LOTAT01 , W.LOTAT02 AS LOTAT02 , W.LOTAT03 AS LOTAT03 , W.LOTAT04 AS LOTAT04 , W.LOTAT05 AS LOTAT05 , W.LOTAT06 AS LOTAT06 , W.LOTAT07 AS LOTAT07 , W.LOTAT08 AS LOTAT08 , W.LOTAT09 AS LOTAT09 , W.LOTAT10 AS LOTAT10 , W.LOTAT11 AS LOTAT11 , W.LOTAT12 AS LOTAT12 , W.LOTAT13 AS LOTAT13 , W.LOTAT14 AS LOTAT14 , W.LOTAT15 AS LOTAT15 , W.LOTAT16 AS LOTAT16 , W.LOTAT17 AS LOTAT17 , W.LOTAT18 AS LOTAT18 , W.LOTAT19 AS LOTAT19 , W.LOTAT20 AS LOTAT20 , W.STKSTAT AS STKSTAT , W.BLOCKID AS BLOCKID , W.PHYSROW AS PHYSROW , W.PHYSSEC AS PHYSSEC , W.PHYSFLO AS PHYSFLO , W.RCVDCKY AS RCVDCKY , W.RCVDCIT AS RCVDCIT , W.TASKOKY AS TASKOKY , W.TASKOIT AS TASKOIT , W.SHPDCKY AS SHPDCKY , W.SHPDCIT AS SHPDCIT , W.ADJSOKY AS ADJSOKY , W.ADJSOIT AS ADJSOIT , W.PHYSOKY AS PHYSOKY , W.PHYSOIT AS PHYSOIT , W.STORFKY AS STORFKY , date_format(W.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CREDATE , date_format(W.CRETIME, '%H-%i-%s') as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(W.COMPKEY , W.CREUSER) AS CREUSER , date_format(W.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS LMODATE , date_format(W.LMOTIME, '%H-%i-%s') as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(W.COMPKEY ,W.LMOUSER) AS LMOUSER , W.INDIBZL AS INDIBZL , W.INDIARC AS INDIARC , W.UPDTCHK AS UPDTCHK FROM WSTKKY W INNER JOIN MSKUWC M ON M.COMPKEY = W.COMPKEY AND M.WAREKEY = W.WAREKEY AND M.OWNERKY = W.OWNERKY AND M.SKUMKEY = W.SKUMKEY WHERE 1=1 AND W.COMPKEY = #{item.compkey} AND W.OWNERKY = #{item.ownerky} AND W.SKUMKEY = #{item.skumkey} AND W.WAREKEY = 'WHOLESALE' AND W.AREAKEY = 'STG' AND W.STKSTAT = (case when #{item.doctype} = '320' then '60' when #{item.doctype} != '320' then '80' end) AND W.STOTQTY > 0 AND W.SALLQTY = 0 AND W.SOUBQTY = 0 AND W.SBLOQTY = 0
mapper.insert: insert into WTAKIT ( COMPKEY , STORFKY , TASKOKY , TASKOIT , TASKSTS , WAREKEY , DOCCATE , DOCTYPE , TRUNTYP , TRUNPID , LOTNMKY , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , SKUDESC , VENDKEY , FRAREKY , FRZONKY , FRLOCKY , TOAREKY , TOZONKY , TOLOCKY , FORDQTY , FUOMEKY , TCMPQTY , TUOMEKY , SIRBCOD , PRODDAT , SHELIFE , EXPIDAT , RCVDCDT , RCVFRDT , LOTFRKY , LOTAT01 , LOTAT02 , LOTAT03 , LOTAT04 , LOTAT05 , LOTAT06 , LOTAT07 , LOTAT08 , LOTAT09 , LOTAT10 , LOTAT11 , LOTAT12 , LOTAT13 , LOTAT14 , LOTAT15 , LOTAT16 , LOTAT17 , LOTAT18 , LOTAT19 , LOTAT20 , PARSNCD , PARSNNM , PKRSNCD , PKRSNNM , RCVDCKY , RCVDCIT , SHPDCKY , SHPDCIT , ALLGRKY , REFSODC , REFSOIT , STKSTAT , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER ) values ( #{item.compkey} , #{item.stockky} , #{item.taskoky} , #{item.taskoit} , "NEW" , #{item.warekey} , #{item.doccate} , #{item.doctype} , #{item.truntyp} , #{item.trunpid} , #{item.lotnmky} , #{item.ownerky} , #{item.skumkey} , (SELECT SKUDESC FROM mskuwc WHERE COMPKEY = #{item.compkey} AND OWNERKY = #{item.ownerky} AND WAREKEY = #{item.warekey} AND SKUMKEY = #{item.skumkey}), #{item.vendkey} , #{item.areakey} , #{item.zonekey} , #{item.locakey} , #{item.toareky} , #{item.tozonky} , #{item.tolocky} , #{item.fordqty} , #{item.suomkey} , 0 , #{item.suomkey} , #{item.sirbcod} , replace(#{item.proddat}, '-', '') , #{item.shelife} , replace(#{item.expidat}, '-', '') , replace(#{item.rcvdcdt}, '-', '') , replace(#{item.rcvfrdt}, '-', '') , #{item.lotfrky} , #{item.lotat01} , #{item.lotat02} , #{item.lotat03} , #{item.lotat04} , #{item.lotat05} , #{item.lotat06} , #{litem.otat07} , #{item.lotat08} , #{item.lotat09} , #{item.lotat10} , #{item.lotat11} , #{item.lotat12} , #{item.lotat13} , #{item.lotat14} , #{item.lotat15} , #{item.lotat16} , #{item.lotat17} , #{item.lotat18} , #{item.lotat19} , #{item.lotat20} , #{item.parsncd} , #{item.parsnnm} , #{item.rsncode} , #{item.adjsrmk} , #{item.rcvdcky} , #{item.rcvdcit} , #{item.shpdcky} , #{item.shpdcit} , #{item.allgrky} , #{item.refsodc} , #{item.refsoit} , #{item.stkstat} , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') , #{userData.useract} , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') , #{userData.useract} )
mapper.select: select count(1) as CNT from WSHPIT where COMPKEY = #{item.compkey} and DOCCATE = '700' and DOCTYPE = (case when #{item.doctype} = '310' then '750' when #{item.doctype} = '330' then '760' when #{item.doctype} = '370' then '770' end) and REFSODC = #{item.cooutky} and REFSOIT = #{item.cooutit}

select COMPKEY , COOUTIT as SHPDCIT , MNGWHKY as WAREKEY , '700' as DOCCATE , case when DOCTYPE = '310' then '750' when DOCTYPE = '330' then '760' when DOCTYPE = '370' then '770' end as DOCTYPE , 'NEW' as SHPDCST , 'NEW' as SHPITST , ' ' as PICKTYP , ' ' as OGSTRKY , ' ' as ALSTRKY , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , (SELECT SKUDESC FROM mskuwc WHERE COMPKEY = OC.COMPKEY AND OWNERKY = OC.OWNERKY AND WAREKEY = OC.MNGWHKY AND SKUMKEY = OC.SKUMKEY) as SKUDESC , to_char(now(),'YYYYMMDD') as SHPPDAY , to_char(now(),'hh24miss') as SHPPTIM , ' ' as SHPSDAY , ' ' as SHPSTIM , ' ' as SPEHTIM , ' ' as SPEITIM , ' ' as SALDATE , CUSTKEY , case when DOCTYPE = '310' then CUSTKEY when DOCTYPE = '330' then VENDKEY when DOCTYPE = '370' then TOWARKY else RETAKEY end as RETAKEY , VENDKEY , SALMEMO , SALRQDT , SALRQTM , case when #{item.scitqty} = 0 then SOITQTY else #{item.scitqty} end as SHCUQTY , case when #{item.scitqty} = 0 then SOITQTY else #{item.scitqty} end as RGITQTY , 0 as SHALQTY , 0 as SHPKQTY , 0 as SHDVSQT , 0 as SHDVEQT , 0 as SHCFQTY , 'EA' as SUOMKEY , 'FREE' as PAYTYPE , DCTCTYP , ' ' as ALLGRKY , ' ' as PAKLBKY , ' ' as REFPODC , ' ' as REFPOIT , COOUTKY as REFSODC , COOUTIT as REFSOIT , ' ' as REFDNDC , ' ' as REFDNIT , ' ' as REFSDDC , ' ' as REFSDIT , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') as CREDATE , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') as CRETIME , #{userData.useract} as CREUSER , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') as LMODATE , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') as LMOTIME , #{userData.useract} as LMOUSER from OCOSAL OC where COMPKEY = #{item.compkey} AND COOUTKY = #{item.cooutky} AND COOUTIT = #{item.cooutit}

select COMPKEY , COOUTIT as EOASNIT , case when DOCTYPE = '310' then 'WHOLESALE' when (DOCTYPE = '320' or DOCTYPE = '350' or DOCTYPE = '360') then TOWARKY else MNGWHKY end as WAREKEY , '400' as DOCCATE , case when DOCTYPE = '310' then '440' when DOCTYPE = '330' then '445' when DOCTYPE = '350' then '450' when (DOCTYPE = '320' or DOCTYPE = '360') then '460' end as DOCTYPE , 'NEW' as ASNSTAT , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , (SELECT SKUDESC FROM mskuwc WHERE COMPKEY = OC.COMPKEY AND OWNERKY = OC.OWNERKY AND WAREKEY = OC.MNGWHKY AND SKUMKEY = OC.SKUMKEY) as SKUDESC , SKUSKEY , ' ' as SIRBCOD , to_char(now(),'YYYYMMDD') as ASNDATE , 0 as POITQTY , 'EA' as PUOMKEY , case when #{item.scitqty} = 0 then SOITQTY else #{item.scitqty} end as ASNDQTY , 'EA' as AUOMKEY , 0 as RCHSQTY , 'EA' as RCHSUOM , case when DOCTYPE = '330' then VENDKEY when (DOCTYPE = '320' or DOCTYPE = '350' or DOCTYPE = '360') then CUSTKEY when DOCTYPE = '310' then MNGWHKY end as VENDKEY , 0 as SPROPRC , ' ' as CARRKEY , ' ' as TRUCKNO , ' ' as TRUCTON , ' ' as PRODDAT , 0 as SHELIFE , ' ' as EXPIDAT , CUSTKEY as CUSTKEY , case when DOCTYPE = '330' AND DCTCTYP = 'TC' then RETAKEY when DOCTYPE = '330' AND DCTCTYP = 'DC' then NULL ELSE CUSTKEY end as RETAKEY , DCTCTYP as DCTCTYP , ' ' as LOTAT01 , ' ' as LOTAT02 , ' ' as LOTAT03 , ' ' as LOTAT04 , ' ' as LOTAT05 , ' ' as LOTAT06 , ' ' as LOTAT07 , ' ' as LOTAT08 , ' ' as LOTAT09 , ' ' as LOTAT10 , ' ' as LOTAT11 , ' ' as LOTAT12 , ' ' as LOTAT13 , ' ' as LOTAT14 , ' ' as LOTAT15 , ' ' as LOTAT16 , case when DOCTYPE = '330' AND DCTCTYP = 'TC' then 'Y' when DOCTYPE = '330' AND DCTCTYP = 'DC' then 'N' ELSE 'N' end as LOTAT17 , case when DOCTYPE = '330' AND DCTCTYP = 'TC' then RETAKEY ELSE ' ' end as LOTAT18 , ' ' as LOTAT19 , ' ' as LOTAT20 , case when DOCTYPE = '310' then '80' when DOCTYPE = '350' then '90' when DOCTYPE in ('360','320','330') then '00' end as STKSTAT , ' ' as RSNCODE , RSNDESC as RCVSRMK , ' ' as COPODKY , ' ' as COPODIT , COOUTKY as REFSODC , COOUTIT as REFSOIT , ' ' as REFDNDC , ' ' as REFDNIT , ' ' as REFSDDC , ' ' as REFSDIT , SALGRKY , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') as CREDATE , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') as CRETIME , #{userData.useract} as CREUSER , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') as LMODATE , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') as LMOTIME , #{userData.useract} as LMOUSER from OCOSAL OC where COMPKEY = #{item.compkey} AND COOUTKY = #{item.cooutky} AND COOUTIT = #{item.cooutit}

SELECT concat(COMPKEY, COOUTKY, COOUTIT) as ROWKEY , COMPKEY , COOUTKY , COOUTIT , DOCCATE , DOCTYPE , SALMODE , SALGRKY , ( SELECT COMCDTX FROM MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = OS.COMPKEY AND COMCDKY = 'SALSTAT' AND COMCDVL = OS.SALSTAT) AS SALSTAT , date_format(POSTDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') as POSTDAT , date_format(SALDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as SALDATE , date_format(SALTIME, '%H-%i-%s') as SALTIME , CASE WHEN (DOCTYPE = '310' OR DOCTYPE = '330' OR DOCTYPE = '370') THEN (SELECT WHNAMLC FROM MWARMA WHERE COMPKEY = OS.COMPKEY AND WAREKEY = OS.MNGWHKY) WHEN (DOCTYPE = '340' or DOCTYPE = '350' or DOCTYPE = '360') THEN (SELECT CUNAMLC FROM MCUSMA WHERE COMPKEY = OS.COMPKEY AND OWNERKY = OS.OWNERKY AND CUSTKEY = OS.CUSTKEY) END AS FRWHONM , CASE WHEN (DOCTYPE = '310' OR DOCTYPE = '330') THEN (SELECT CUNAMLC FROM MCUSMA WHERE COMPKEY = OS.COMPKEY AND OWNERKY = OS.OWNERKY AND CUSTKEY = OS.CUSTKEY) WHEN (DOCTYPE = '350' OR DOCTYPE = '360' OR DOCTYPE = '370' ) THEN (SELECT WHNAMLC FROM MWARMA WHERE COMPKEY = OS.COMPKEY AND WAREKEY = OS.MNGWHKY) WHEN (DOCTYPE = '340') THEN (SELECT PTNAMLC FROM MPTNMA WHERE COMPKEY = OS.COMPKEY AND OWNERKY = OS.OWNERKY AND PTNRKEY = OS.RETAKEY) END AS TOWHONM , CUSTKEY , RETAKEY
, SALMEMO , date_format(SALRQDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as SALRQDT , date_format(SALRQTM), '%H-%i-%s') as SALRQTM , SALLBYN , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , SKUDESC , SKUSKEY , SOITQTY , RGITQTY , SUOMKEY , PAYTYPE , DCTCTYP , MNGWHKY , RSNCODE , RSNDESC , (SELECT COMCDTX FROM MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = OS.COMPKEY AND COMCDKY = 'INBSTAT' AND COMCDVL = OS.INBSTAT) AS INBSTAT , (SELECT COMCDTX FROM MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = OS.COMPKEY AND COMCDKY = 'OUBSTAT' AND COMCDVL = OS.OUBSTAT) AS OUBSTAT , ITMCOST , SELPRIC , SEDPRIC , SEPRICE , ORDGR01 , ORDGR02 , ORDGR03 , CLOSLYN , CLODATE , CLOTIME , CLOUSER , SPRETYP , PMTSAYN , PMTSADT , PMTSATM , PMTSAUR , date_format(CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as CREDATE , date_format(CRETIME, '%Y-%m-%d') as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, CREUSER) as CREUSER , date_format(LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as LMODATE , date_format(LMOTIME, '%Y-%m-%d') as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LMOUSER) as LMOUSER FROM OCOSAL OS WHERE 1=1 and COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and DOCCATE = '300'
and (CUSTKEY = #{custkey} or RETAKEY = #{custkey} or MNGWHKY = #{custkey})
and SALSTAT = #{salstat}
and SALRQDT >= REPLACE(#{salrqdf}, '-', '')
and SALRQDT <= REPLACE(#{salrqdt}, '-', '')
and SALRQTM <= REPLACE(#{salrqtm}, ':', '')
and DOCTYPE = #{doctype}
and DOCTYPE in ('310','330','340','350','360','370')
and INBSTAT = #{inbstat}
and OUBSTAT = #{oubstat}
and upper(SALMEMO) like concat('%', upper(#{salmemo}), '%')
and upper(SKUMKEY) like concat('%', upper(#{skumkey}), '%')
and upper(skudesc) like concat('%', upper(#{skudesc}), '%')
